top_signals.title: SpaceX Files for IPO Showing $4.28 Billion Quarterly Loss
top_signals.summary: SpaceX filed publicly for its initial public offering, revealing billions in losses and the super-voting share plan allowing Elon Musk to keep the rocket, satellite and artificial intelligence giant under his control, and prevent him from being removed from power against his will.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
